MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regularly scheduled calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:J.Stokes/P.Dias, Reporter:Lois Jones. All parties present except defendant. Plaintiff represented by Arnold W. Evje II. Defendant had called and said that he might not make the settlement conference because he had to take his son to the emergency.Defendant was told to bring a medical note. The case was taken off-calendar.
